item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
so comfortable
mmm hmm
love vice city but san andreas is the best
not much of a video call person
let's gooo
people love when you scan them
someone's never seen the Free Willy series
wait.. back up
you can do this with a lot of devices?
fire away.. if you want
that's a nope
i love weed and seth but yeah..
i knew it
we've all sold teeth at one point or another
what's the rarest fish i can invest in??
i think this is a real ad from way long ago
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Share those problems guys, we can support you! Not everything is on you!

item.title: Just bebe
item.description: Not my bebe. My cat would go Freddy Kruger on me if I attempted this. Some piano background music (sounds like Ludovico Einaudi) and happy senior kitty purrs at the end. Edit: The music is Andrea Vanzo's "Valzer d'Inverno". https://youtu.be/D5uc2mJi3Mg?feature=shared Thanks to @myotherusernameisalreadytaken !
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: Got the skills
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: A collection of old images and videos I have saved on my phone as a form of interacting with other people (Part 4)
item.description:
Hello everyone, I hope you are having a good day. I have been playing the elden ring dlc, so I think it's only fair to share some old elden ring/dark souls stuff I got on my phone. I haven't beaten it yet because I am playing it with my brother, and we are trying to explore everything we can without looking stuff up. I've been having fun with the dlc so far, though.
It's pretty accurate.
*Doubt*
All I need now is two friends.
Every time.
I heard you can control white people with cheese.
The only six pack I'll drink.
Everyone thinks I am a very calm and easygoing person.
Now for music.
*starting at you till you upvote*
Dino nuggets and Mac n cheese is so good.
I am not on any medication, and I am pretty sure life is raw dogging me.
A lot lot better.
The only reason I can think of.
Elden ring art tax.
item.dc:creator: Haitharg

item.title: The Great Kilt
item.description: The great kilt also known as the belted plaid. The great kilt was a standard item of men's Highland dress from the late 16th century until the middle of the 18th century. It was also the precursor of the modern tailored kilt.

item.title: Random assortment of memes n whatnot
item.dc:creator: MayMayz4DayzYo

item.title: 76yrs old, dude tried to help folks
item.description: He watched the fattening of the US, he didn't know everything but he tried to help people fight it. He encouraged unhealthy people that they could change things and worked to give them the tools necessary. All with a smile. Never judged, never insulted. He wasn't about vanity or pride. I'm not saying he was Mr. Rodgers but he's on the list.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: Red and black harness
item.description:
Here's one of the last few harnesses I made, first a quick one right after finishing
Tried getting a fancy picture with my new photo setup
And lastly few photos from a photoshoot at an abandoned hospital
Also in the picture bracelets I made
And the pupper tax with Bach
item.dc:creator: Affaltar

item.title: A palate cleanser from... everything
item.description:
Just have a couple things, pet tax at the end, quick in n out dump morty
Anyway here's unrelated Belgian techno anthem Pump Up The Jam but with a dog
The two in question that I'm pet sitting. Oh it's so much easier with just the cat. I got a rule, drunks kids and dogs, I'll need a paycheck. Cats I'll do for a fridge raid. We had a big storm after I got off work late and doggo needs one walk a day so I decided better late than never. Mud patch. Cartoon banana peel sound effects. Luckily I ascribe to the go bag philosophy. I had just enough bandaids left for the scrapes. And Mr. Magoo'd it past most of it that would've ruined my clothes. Change of shirt, and 3 bandaids later... I'm ready for my late night/ early morning dinner
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation

item.title: Women tolerate me and fish ignore me
item.description: I know it's a little late in the year to be getting a new license, but this is actually a big accomplishment for me to have knocked out. Depression is a motherfucker. But I've slowly been getting out and hiking, and the plan is to do a backpacking/fishing trip in a few months.
item.dc:creator: digitalaaronscustoms

item.title: "Science: the non-partisan foundation of progress and innovation
item.dc:creator: twocurlsonepushup

item.title: I can't stop thinking about it.
item.description: My stepson, age 25, has always been a problem. His main goal is to make me leave his mother. He's done it twice before, and literally admitted it. Last week (just barely 7 days) he came up to me and told me to take off my glasses. I kinda chuckled, and said no. He said it two more times, and both times I said "I'm not going to fight with you". He punched me three times in the face before I even tried to stop him. Broke my glasses on the first one, broke a tooth and knocked my glasses off my face on the second one, and broke another tooth on the third. Between the three I basically couldn't see from that eye, and obviously had a black eye. I'll skip the "fight" and just say: I wish I would've hit back. I'm not some badass fighter, but I did well in amateur MMA/boxing matches in high school... I could've absolutely destroyed him. Instead, I just let him hit me. Over and over. I still have bruises a week later. I still have the two broken teeth. One of which JUST got fixed. Every day, for hours, I just think about how I should've fought back. Obviously he's not around me anymore, but I just have this fucking rage about it. He didn't have an easy life before me, and I know that. But it won't stop. Every day I imagine just NOT being the bigger man. I want to beat the fuck out of him. My wife, who I love, would be mad. But I just don't care right now. I can't let it go and I just want to beat his fucking face in. It would've been SOOOO easy. He's 25lbs under me, and even though I was an amateur teen 30lbs above me was literally my weight class.... Nobody else would "play" after the first round unless they had a big advantage. I'm just fantasizing about it, beating his face in. But I feel horrible too. It's my wife's kid. Even worse, I was starting to think of him as the "only kid I'd ever have". I miss him. I thought we were doing good.... Hello, death in usersub, welcome to the asshole.
item.dc:creator: Cindex1337

item.title: "He Chose Purple. And We Chose a Son"
item.description: Photo: Pixabay https://pixabay.com/illustrations/rainbow-flag-rainbow-gay-pride-7969658/ Sauce: 1864 House, “Coming Out Day—My Family Story.” Daily Kos. 11 October 2008 https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2008/10/11/627782/-#read-more
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: When the post is garbage but the comment thread is lit.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I was not prepared.
item.description: Went out with the neighbor's daughter after she had been hinting heavily for 3 years. We live rural so we decided to stay in at my place. I play some Zelda lofi remixes cause I'm such a boss but she has never played the games. This triggers something in me and I go off on a tangent, describing the game and it's Lore. In the middle of a sentence she just takes her shirt off. I don't miss a beat cause im a boss, I just ask her if she is hot and turn the ceiling fan on, because I'm on up to OOT. She sits there for another 90 mins just as interested as can be but I can tell she doesn't care. My last therapy appointment she mentioned nuerodivergent and it's making me think. "Am I autistic?" It would explain so much. Like maybe I'm "high functioning " But anyway that was just a moment in the 'date' we drink homemade wine and smoked weed and listened to music while I expounded in the pompotous of love. It was a goof night. She is coming around later. She is amazing. After 42 years I might have met a partner. Edit: date 2 was a success. We danced. I showed her internet shit she has never seen before. I showed her childish Gambino for the first time. She got cold. I tucked her in. She wants to see me again. I touched her thigh and made it jiggle. She laughed. I been waiting 30 years for this.
item.dc:creator: Dednotsleeping82

item.title: 40 Roman Memes

item.title: My mom said she would give me a cookie if I made it to the Front Page (CHAOTIC MEME DUMP)
item.description:
1. Harder
2. Insightful used car-buying advice that everyone should know.
3. A kitten being lured out from under the hood of a car to be rescued
4. "What? Why are you looking at me like that?"
5 *JUMPS AFTER IT*
6. Rocket racoon
7
8. Interesting eye make up
9. Mama Mia what a flipa
10
12
13
14. Check out all the duets
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
